title: 2026 F1 Engine & Battery Deployement Explained (MGU-K)
description:
F1 2026 just introduced one tiny word in the regulations — “pending” — and it completely changes how drivers use the throttle on corner exit.

In this video I break down what a power-limited pending period actually means in driver language, why the car no longer gives a sudden hybrid “kick”, and how the 150kW rule forces drivers to commit to throttle earlier instead of waiting for a boost moment.

You’ll learn:
• What “power-limited” vs “traction-limited” really feels like in the car
• Why the b

title: World's Fastest Camera Drone Vs F1 Car (ft. Max Verstappen)
description:
This is Formula 1 like you’ve never seen it before. The @dutchdronegods follow Max Verstappen’s brand new @redbullracing  RB20 F1 car for a full lap of Silverstone’s Grand Prix Circuit. The world first uninterrupted FPV one shot was captured by a manually piloted custom built drone, designed specifically for the challenge of keeping up with the car at speeds of over 300kph.

SOFTWARE USED
I use Blender 3D to create these models. It's free and open source, and the community is amazing:
https://www.blender.org/

title: Romain Grosjean Walks Away From Dramatic, Fiery Crash | 2020 Bahrain Grand Prix
description:
Please be aware that there is some graphic footage included in this video. We are so incredibly thankful that Romain Grosjean was able to walk away from this crash in Bahrain on Sunday. A reminder of the bravery and brilliance of our drivers, marshals, and medical teams, and of the advances in safety in our sport.
